name: SLURM job submission template — MareNostrum 5 GPP partition
description: Parameterised SLURM batch script for the gpp_compute partition of MareNostrum 5 (BSC). Each MN5 GPP node has 112 cores (Intel Sapphire Rapids); typical jobs request 1–8 nodes and bind OpenMP threads to cores via OMP_NUM_THREADS = cpus-per-task. Compatible with Siesta, CP2K, OpenFOAM, and other MPI+OpenMP scientific codes. Validated against MN5 documentation (April 2026).

parameters.label: Job name
parameters.note: Appears in queue listing and in the SLURM output filename pattern.

parameters.label: Partition
parameters.note: MN5 GPP partitions: gpp_compute (production), gpp_debug (≤1 hour test runs), gpp_bsccs (BSC-CCS reservations). Use acc_compute for GPU jobs.

parameters.label: Number of nodes
parameters.note: MN5 GPP scales smoothly to ~8–16 nodes for most scientific workloads. Beyond that, communication patterns dominate; profile first.

parameters.label: MPI tasks per node
parameters.note: Constraint: tasksPerNode * cpusPerTask ≤ 112 (cores per MN5 GPP node).

parameters.label: OpenMP threads per task
parameters.note: Constraint: tasksPerNode * cpusPerTask ≤ 112. Defaults give 8 MPI × 14 OpenMP = 112 threads per node, cleanly filling the socket.

parameters.label: Wall-time limit
parameters.note: Format HH:MM:SS or D-HH:MM:SS. gpp_compute hard cap is 72 hours (3 days); request only what you need.

parameters.label: QOS (Quality of Service)
parameters.note: Pick based on your project allocation; gp_debug for short test runs.

parameters.label: Charge account
parameters.note: Project / group code that GPU-hours are billed to.

parameters.label: Application command
parameters.note: The actual binary + arguments. Typically wrapped in srun --cpu-bind=cores when tasks > 1.

validation: tasksPerNode * cpusPerTask ≤ 112 (MN5 GPP node has exactly 112 cores)
timeLimit must match HH:MM:SS or D-HH:MM:SS regex; reject other formats
partition must be one of gpp_compute, gpp_debug, gpp_bsccs (or acc_* for GPU)
if partition starts with acc_, gpusPerNode must be set (default 4 for MN5 ACC)
if partition starts with gpp_, gpusPerNode must NOT be set (CPU partition)
OMP_NUM_THREADS environment variable must equal cpusPerTask
srun --cpu-bind=cores required when total tasks > 1 to avoid thread migration
output and error filenames default to <jobName>-%j.out / .err if not specified
references: Hager & Wellein — Introduction to High Performance Computing for Scientists and Engineers, ch.6 (OpenMP placement)
